About Me

Security engineer with 9+ years of experience across network engineering, DevSecOps, and enterprise security operations. Experience with SIEM operations, EDR/XDR, firewall management, AWS security controls, vulnerability management, and automation improving detection and response capabilities.

9+ Years Experience
3 Major Roles
2 Certifications
Portland, OR • Open to relocation for the right opportunity

Core Skills

Security & Detection

SIEM & Detection Engineering EDR/XDR Incident Response Vulnerability Management Firewall & IDS/IPS Management

Cloud & DevSecOps

AWS Security CI/CD Security SAST/DAST Integration Infrastructure as Code IAM Hardening

Automation & Tools

Python/Bash Automation Linux Administration Networking (TCP/IP, DNS) CloudTrail & Monitoring

Professional Experience

Security Engineer

Current
Lumovy Technology Solutions • Portland, OR

2023 - Present

  • Operate SIEM detection pipelines and develop alert rules supporting incident response.
  • Administer EDR/XDR tools and integrate endpoint telemetry with centralized logging.
  • Implement firewall policies and segmentation to reduce attack surface.
  • Automate alert enrichment and vulnerability remediation workflows.

DevSecOps Engineer

Effectual • Portland, OR

2018 - 2023

  • Integrated SAST, DAST, and dependency scanning into CI/CD pipelines.
  • Implemented AWS security controls including IAM hardening, CloudTrail logging, and monitoring.
  • Led vulnerability remediation coordination with engineering teams.
  • Developed infrastructure-as-code templates with security guardrails.

Network Engineer

University of South Florida • Tampa, FL

2014 - 2018

  • Maintained enterprise network infrastructure including routing, switching, and firewalls.
  • Improved monitoring and access control across campus systems.
  • Supported incident investigations and network troubleshooting.

Education & Certifications

Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

University of South Florida

Tampa, FL

Certifications
